outcomes.leaf: Probe libfoo 2.0 streaming API against the ingest fixture

suite.output_tail:
FAILED tests/test_ingest.py - AttributeError: module 'libfoo' has no attribute 'stream'
libfoo 2.0 CHANGELOG: 'the streaming API was removed; use the batch iterator instead'
5 failed

findings.summary: libfoo 2.0 removed the streaming API entirely (CHANGELOG confirms); the epic's core assumption — migrate adapters TO streaming — is impossible.
